# picsur-admin
Description: Picsur image host API management — upload, delete, list, metadata
Source: project
Scripts: test_connection.py, auth_test.py
Use this skill to interact with the Picsur self-hosted image service via its REST API. Authentication uses a Bearer API key. Common operations: upload images, list images, delete images, get metadata, check user info.
